ads.prompt: Dr. Berg health education ad. A confident doctor in a white coat stands in a bright modern kitchen surrounded by avocados, eggs, and keto foods. Bold yellow text overlays: 'STOP COUNTING CALORIES'. Cut to animated fat cells shrinking rapidly. End card: 'Keto works because of THIS'. Cinematic clean aesthetic, green and white color palette, fast-paced motivational ad style.

Dr. Berg intermittent fasting ad. Split screen: left — exhausted person eating 6 small meals, bloated and tired. Right — same person doing 16:8 fasting, energetic, lean, glowing. Bold white text: 'EAT LESS OFTEN. LIVE LONGER.' Animated clock showing fasting window. Clean modern health ad, blue and white tones, punchy fast cuts, motivational music vibe.

Dr. Berg vitamin D deficiency ad. Dramatic shot of sunlight breaking through storm clouds. Cut to close-up of a fatigued person rubbing their eyes at a desk. Red warning text flashes: '73% OF PEOPLE ARE DEFICIENT'. Animated body scan highlighting bones, immune system, brain. End card: 'Are YOU missing this?'. Urgent, cinematic, dark-to-light color grade, health awareness ad style.
